scripts.size: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const zlib=require('zlib');const assets=fs.readdirSync('dist/assets').filter((file)=>file.endsWith('.js'));if(!assets.length){console.error('FAIL: no JS bundle found');process.exit(1)}const file=path.join('dist/assets', assets.find((name)=>name.startsWith('index-'))||assets[0]);const buf=fs.readFileSync(file);zlib.gzip(buf,(e,b)=>{if(e) throw e;const kb=b.length/1024;console.log('Bundle file:', file);console.log('Bundle size:',kb.toFixed(1),'KB gzipped');if(kb>50){console.error('FAIL: bundle exceeds 50KB');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('PASS: under 50KB limit')}});"
